expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]为总测量，[板厚]是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚]是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุกระดานด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุกระดานพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga laki ng tabla para sa kabinet. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa itaas, ibaba, at gilid na tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng likurang tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်စာရွက်အတိုင်းအတာများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height],[Depth] ဆိုသည်မှာ စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်အပေါ်ဘက်၊ အောက်ခြေ၊ တစ်ဖက်ဖက်သစ်သားပစ္စည်းအထူကိုဆိုလိုပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်ဖောင်လိုင်ဘုတ်ပစၥည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអង់ហ្វូរ​សម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជា​ការ​រាប់រួម​គ្នា​ទាំងអស់, [BoardThick] គឺជា​ភាព​ក្រាស់នៃសម្ភារៈ​លើ ក្រោម​​និង​ជ្រុង​​នៃ​ចាន, [BackBoardThick] គឺជា​ភាព​ក្រាស់​នៃ​សម្ភារៈ​បែប​​បញ្ចេញផ្ទៃ​ខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດບອດສຳລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ເປັນຂະໜາດທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມຫນາຂອງວັດຖຸຂອງແຜ່ນສູງ, ຕ່ຳແລະທາງຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນ​ຄວາມ​ຫນາ​ຂອງ​ວັດ​ຖຸ​ຂອງ​ແຜ່ນ​ພື້ນ​ຫລັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は合計寸法です。[BoardThick] は上板、下板、側板の材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] はバックボードの材料の厚さです。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛을 위한 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 소재 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 소재 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de los tableros superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero trasero. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérale, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtabmessungen, [BoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करें। [Width], [Height],[Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] - это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
